contentBlocks.original:
अधरं मधुरं वदनं मधुरं नयनं मधुरं हसितं मधुरम् |
हृदयं मधुरं गमनं मधुरं मधुराधिपतेरखिलं मधुरम् ||1||
contentBlocks.transliteration:
adharaṃ madhuraṃ vadanaṃ madhuraṃ nayanaṃ madhuraṃ hasitaṃ madhuram |
hṛdayaṃ madhuraṃ gamanaṃ madhuraṃ madhurādhipaterakhilaṃ madhuram ||1||
contentBlocks.translation: His lips are sweet, His face is sweet, His eyes are sweet, His smile is sweet, His loving heart is sweet, His gait (walk) is sweet, Everything is completely sweet about the Lord of Sweetness.
contentBlocks.meanings: अधरं (adharaṃ) – lips; मधुरं (madhuraṃ) – sweet; वदनं (vadanaṃ) – face; मधुरं (madhuraṃ) – sweet; नयनं (nayanaṃ) – eyes; मधुरं (madhuraṃ) – sweet; हसितं (hasitaṃ) – smile; मधुरम् (madhuram) – sweet; हृदयं (hṛdayaṃ) – heart; मधुरं (madhuraṃ) – sweet; गमनं (gamanaṃ) – gait; मधुरं (madhuraṃ) – sweet; मधुराधिपतेः (madhurādhipateḥ) – of the Lord of Sweetness (madhura:sweet | adhipateḥ:of the lord); अखिलं (akhilaṃ) – everything; मधुरम् (madhuram) – sweet;

contentBlocks.original:
वचनं मधुरं चरितं मधुरं वसनं मधुरं वलितं मधुरम् |
चलितं मधुरं भ्रमितं मधुरं मधुराधिपतेरखिलं मधुरम् ||2||
contentBlocks.transliteration:
vacanaṃ madhuraṃ caritaṃ madhuraṃ vasanaṃ madhuraṃ valitaṃ madhuram |
calitaṃ madhuraṃ bhramitaṃ madhuraṃ madhurādhipaterakhilaṃ madhuram ||2||
contentBlocks.translation: His words are sweet, His character is sweet, His dress (garment) is sweet, His posture is sweet, His movements are sweet, His wandering (roaming) is sweet, Everything is completely sweet about the Lord of Sweetness.
contentBlocks.meanings: वचनं (vacanaṃ) – words; मधुरं (madhuraṃ) – sweet; चरितं (caritaṃ) – character; मधुरं (madhuraṃ) – sweet; वसनं (vasanaṃ) – dress; मधुरं (madhuraṃ) – sweet; वलितं (valitaṃ) – posture; मधुरम् (madhuram) – sweet; चलितं (calitaṃ) – movements; मधुरं (madhuraṃ) – sweet; भ्रमितं (bhramitaṃ) – wandering; मधुरं (madhuraṃ) – sweet; मधुराधिपतेः (madhurādhipateḥ) – of the Lord of Sweetness (madhura:sweet | adhipateḥ:of the Lord); अखिलं (akhilaṃ) – everything; मधुरम् (madhuram) – sweet;

contentBlocks.original:
वेणुर्मधुरो रेणुर्मधुरः पाणिर्मधुरः पादौ मधुरौ |
नृत्यं मधुरं सख्यं मधुरं मधुराधिपतेरखिलं मधुरम् ||3||
contentBlocks.transliteration:
veṇurmadhuro reṇurmadhuraḥ pāṇirmadhuraḥ pādau madhurau |
nṛtyaṃ madhuraṃ sakhyaṃ madhuraṃ madhurādhipaterakhilaṃ madhuram ||3||
contentBlocks.translation: His flute-playing is sweet, His foot-dust is sweet, His hands are sweet, His feet are sweet, His dancing is sweet, His friendship is sweet, Everything is completely sweet about the Lord of Sweetness.
contentBlocks.meanings: वेणुः (veṇuḥ) – flute; मधुरः (madhuraḥ) – sweet; रेणुः (reṇuḥ) – dust; मधुरः (madhuraḥ) – sweet; पाणिः (pāṇiḥ) – hand; मधुरः (madhuraḥ) – sweet; पादौ (pādau) – feet; मधुरौ (madhurau) – sweet; नृत्यम् (nṛtyam) – dancing; मधुरम् (madhuram) – sweet; सख्यम् (sakhyam) – friendship; मधुरम् (madhuram) – sweet; मधुराधिपतेः (madhurādhipateḥ) – of the Lord of Sweetness (madhura:sweet | adhipateḥ:of the lord); अखिलम् (akhilam) – everything; मधुरम् (madhuram) – sweet;

contentBlocks.original:
गीतं मधुरं पीतं मधुरं भुक्तं मधुरं सुप्तं मधुरम् |
रूपं मधुरं तिलकं मधुरं मधुराधिपतेरखिलं मधुरम् ||4||
contentBlocks.transliteration:
gītaṃ madhuraṃ pītaṃ madhuraṃ bhuktaṃ madhuraṃ suptaṃ madhuram |
rūpaṃ madhuraṃ tilakaṃ madhuraṃ madhurādhipaterakhilaṃ madhuram ||4||
contentBlocks.translation: His song is sweet, His drinking is sweet, His eating is sweet, His sleeping is sweet, His beautiful form is sweet, His Tilaka (mark on the forehead) is sweet, Everything is completely sweet about the Lord of Sweetness.
contentBlocks.meanings: गीतं (gītaṃ) – song; मधुरं (madhuraṃ) – sweet; पीतं (pītaṃ) – drinking; मधुरं (madhuraṃ) – sweet; भुक्तं (bhuktaṃ) – eating; मधुरं (madhuraṃ) – sweet; सुप्तं (suptaṃ) – sleeping; मधुरम् (madhuram) – sweet; रूपं (rūpaṃ) – form; मधुरं (madhuraṃ) – sweet; तिलकं (tilakaṃ) – forehead mark; मधुरं (madhuraṃ) – sweet; मधुराधिपतेः (madhurādhipateḥ) – of the Lord of Sweetness (madhura:sweet | adhipateḥ:of the lord); अखिलं (akhilaṃ) – everything; मधुरम् (madhuram) – sweet;

contentBlocks.original:
करणं मधुरं तरणं मधुरं हरणं मधुरं स्मरणं मधुरम् |
वमितं मधुरं शमितं मधुरं मधुराधिपतेरखिलं मधुरम् ||5||
contentBlocks.transliteration:
karaṇaṃ madhuraṃ taraṇaṃ madhuraṃ haraṇaṃ madhuraṃ smaraṇaṃ madhuram |
vamitaṃ madhuraṃ śamitaṃ madhuraṃ madhurādhipaterakhilaṃ madhuram ||5||
contentBlocks.translation: His deeds (activities) are sweet, His conquest (liberating) is sweet, His thieving (stealing) is sweet, His love-sports are sweet, His oblations (offerings) are sweet, His countenance is sweet, Everything is completely sweet about the Lord of Sweetness.
contentBlocks.meanings: करणं (karaṇam) – deed; मधुरं (madhuram) – sweet; तरणं (taraṇam) – conquest; मधुरं (madhuram) – sweet; हरणं (haraṇam) – thieving; मधुरं (madhuram) – sweet; स्मरणं (smaraṇam) – love-sports; मधुरम् (madhuram) – sweet; वमितं (vamitaṃ) – oblations; मधुरं (madhuram) – sweet; शमितं (śamitaṃ) – countenance; मधुरं (madhuram) – sweet; मधुराधिपतेः (madhurādhipateḥ) – of the Lord of Sweetness (madhura:sweetness | adhipateḥ:of the Lord); अखिलं (akhilam) – everything; मधुरम् (madhuram) – sweet;

contentBlocks.original:
गुञ्जा मधुरा माला मधुरा यमुना मधुरा वीची मधुरा |
सलिलं मधुरं कमलं मधुरं मधुराधिपतेरखिलं मधुरम् ||6||
contentBlocks.transliteration:
guñjā madhurā mālā madhurā yamunā madhurā vīcī madhurā |
salilaṃ madhuraṃ kamalaṃ madhuraṃ madhurādhipaterakhilaṃ madhuram ||6||
contentBlocks.translation: His gunja-berry (Chirmi) necklace is sweet, His flower garland is sweet, sweet is the Yamuna river, and sweet are her rippling waves, her water is sweet, and sweet are the lotus flowers also, Everything is completely sweet about the Lord of Sweetness.
contentBlocks.meanings: गुञ्जा (guñjā) – gunja-berry; मधुरा (madhurā) – sweet; माला (mālā) – garland; मधुरा (madhurā) – sweet; यमुना (yamunā) – Yamuna river; मधुरा (madhurā) – sweet; वीची (vīcī) – waves; मधुरा (madhurā) – sweet; सलिलं (salilaṃ) – water; मधुरं (madhuraṃ) – sweet; कमलं (kamalaṃ) – lotus; मधुरं (madhuraṃ) – sweet; मधुराधिपतेः (madhurādhipateḥ) – of the Lord of Sweetness (madhura:sweet | adhipateḥ:of the Lord); अखिलं (akhilaṃ) – everything; मधुरम् (madhuram) – sweet;

contentBlocks.original:
गोपि मधुरा लीला मधुरा युक्तं मधुरं भुक्तं मधुरम् |
दृष्टं मधुरं शिष्टं मधुरं मधुराधिपतेरखिलं मधुरम् ||7||
contentBlocks.transliteration:
gopi madhurā līlā madhurā yuktaṃ madhuraṃ bhuktaṃ madhuram |
dṛṣṭaṃ madhuraṃ śiṣṭaṃ madhuraṃ madhurādhipaterakhilaṃ madhuram ||7||
contentBlocks.translation: His gopis (cowherd girlfriends) are sweet, His pastimes (plays) are sweet, His union (meeting him) is sweet, His deliverance (rescue) is sweet, His sidelong glances are sweet, His courtesy (etiquette) is sweet, Everything is completely sweet about the Lord of Sweetness.
contentBlocks.meanings: गोपि (gopi) – cowherd girlfriend; मधुरा (madhurā) – sweet; लीला (līlā) – pastimes; मधुरा (madhurā) – sweet; युक्तं (yuktaṃ) – union; मधुरं (madhuraṃ) – sweet; भुक्तं (bhuktaṃ) – deliverance; मधुरम् (madhuram) – sweet; दृष्टं (dṛṣṭaṃ) – sidelong glances; मधुरं (madhuraṃ) – sweet; शिष्टं (śiṣṭaṃ) – courtesy; मधुरं (madhuraṃ) – sweet; मधुराधिपतेः (madhurādhipateḥ) – of the Lord of Sweetness (madhura:sweet | adhipateḥ:of the Lord); अखिलं (akhilaṃ) – everything; मधुरम् (madhuram) – sweet;

contentBlocks.original:
गोपा मधुरा गावो मधुरा यष्टिर्मधुरा सृष्टिर्मधुरा |
दलितं मधुरं फलितं मधुरं मधुराधिपतेरखिलं मधुरम् ||8||
contentBlocks.transliteration:
gopā madhurā gāvo madhurā yaṣṭirmadhurā sṛṣṭirmadhurā |
dalitaṃ madhuraṃ phalitaṃ madhuraṃ madhurādhipaterakhilaṃ madhuram ||8||
contentBlocks.translation: His gopas (cowherd boyfriends) are sweet, His cows are sweet, His cane (herding-stick) is sweet, His creation is sweet, His victory (trampling) is sweet, His accomplishment (fruition) is sweet, Everything is completely sweet about the Lord of Sweetness.
contentBlocks.meanings: गोपा (gopā) – cowherd boys; मधुरा (madhurā) – sweet; गावः (gāvaḥ) – cows; मधुरा (madhurā) – sweet; यष्टिः (yaṣṭiḥ) – cane; मधुरा (madhurā) – sweet; सृष्टिः (sṛṣṭiḥ) – creation; मधुरा (madhurā) – sweet; दलितम् (dalitam) – trampling; मधुरम् (madhuram) – sweet; फलितम् (phalitam) – accomplishment; मधुरम् (madhuram) – sweet; मधुराधिपतेः (madhurādhipateḥ) – of the Lord of Sweetness (madhura:sweet | adhipateḥ:of the Lord); अखिलम् (akhilam) – everything; मधुरम् (madhuram) – sweet;
